stereotype: «Engine» — Method-specific knowledge of HOW to draft each Phase-1 typed artifact via an LLM
volatility: The Method-specific knowledge of how to draft each Phase-1 typed artifact via an LLM — which prompt to send per kind, how to shape the LLM's structured output back into a typed model via projectstate's smart constructors, and how to weave architect feedback into a redraft prompt.

ops.stereotype: Activity — called from Manager-owned GenerateMethodArtifactActivity (I/O via workerAccess.Dispatch)
ops.note: Assembles Phase-1 mission-statement prompt, dispatches LLM round-trip, constructs typed MissionStatement from response.

fields.name: Feedback
fields.note: nil on first draft; non-nil on redraft with architect rejection rationale

fields.name: Key
fields.note: caller-supplied, stable per logical Generate call; passed through to workerAccess.Dispatch

ops.signature: GenerateGlossary(ctx, mission *MissionStatement, feedback *Feedback, key fwra.IdempotencyKey) → (*Glossary, error)
ops.note: Assembles glossary prompt from mission context, dispatches LLM, constructs typed Glossary.

ops.signature: GenerateScrubbedRequirements(ctx, mission *MissionStatement, glossary *Glossary, feedback *Feedback, key fwra.IdempotencyKey) → (*ScrubbedRequirements, error)
ops.note: Drafts scrubbed requirements with solutions-masquerading-as-requirements removed.

ops.signature: GenerateVolatilities(ctx, mission *MissionStatement, glossary *Glossary, scrubbedRequirements *ScrubbedRequirements, feedback *Feedback, key fwra.IdempotencyKey) → (*Volatilities, error)
ops.note: Drafts the two-axis volatility list scoped to mission + glossary + scrubbed requirements.

ops.signature: GenerateCoreUseCases(ctx, mission *MissionStatement, glossary *Glossary, volatilities *Volatilities, feedback *Feedback, key fwra.IdempotencyKey) → (*CoreUseCases, error)
ops.note: Drafts 2–6 core use cases derived by abstraction.

ops.signature: GenerateSystem(ctx, mission *MissionStatement, glossary *Glossary, volatilities *Volatilities, coreUseCases *CoreUseCases, feedback *Feedback, key fwra.IdempotencyKey) → (*System, error)
ops.note: Drafts the Grammar A System: components, relationships, dynamic views.

ops.signature: GenerateOperationalConcepts(ctx, mission *MissionStatement, system *System, feedback *Feedback, key fwra.IdempotencyKey) → (*OperationalConcepts, error)
ops.note: Drafts operational concepts: per-decision justification against a mission objective.

ops.signature: GenerateStandardCheck(ctx, system *System, operationalConcepts *OperationalConcepts, feedback *Feedback, key fwra.IdempotencyKey) → (*StandardCheck, error)
ops.note: Drafts the Phase-1 standard-check pass with waiver justifications.

dataContracts: Feedback = { Notes string } // architect's rejection rationale woven into next prompt on redraft
fwra.IdempotencyKey // caller-supplied, passed through to workerAccess.Dispatch for dedup

Typed Phase-1 models (MissionStatement, Glossary, ScrubbedRequirements, Volatilities, CoreUseCases, System, OperationalConcepts, StandardCheck) — canonical in projectStateAccess.md §3 / projectstate Go package; not redefined here
fweng.Error = { Kind: ContractMisuse | InvalidInput | InternalInvariant } // ContractMisuse: nil required predecessor or empty key; InvalidInput: LLM output unparseable or smart-constructor rejection
*fwra.Error bubbled untouched from workerAccess.Dispatch for transport/auth/quota failures
errorModel: fweng.Error for contract/parse failures; *fwra.Error bubbled untouched from workerAccess for transport-layer failures. ContractMisuse: Manager wiring bug (nil predecessor, empty key) — crash-fast in test, escalate in release. InvalidInput: LLM produced unconstructable output — surface via intervention, do NOT loop worker. InternalInvariant: Engine bug. No retryable flag on the Engine surface — Manager Activity classifies retryability from fwra.Error kinds.
idempotency: Idempotent through workerAccess dedup: identical inputs + same key → same recorded FileUpload → same typed model. Engine maintains no dedup table of its own. key is caller-supplied fwra.IdempotencyKey derived by the Manager Activity as '${workflowId}:${activityId}'.

revisions.byActivity: D-SDE (detailed design, NET-NEW component from 2026-05-27 rework)
revisions.summary: NET-NEW Engine introduced in the 2026-05-27 rework. Typed Method models moved to projectstate package; workerAccess reduced to thin Dispatch/Cancel transport; parse-to-typed-model moved to this Engine. Eight named per-kind Generate verbs. App C §6: 8/9 PASS, 1 JUSTIFIED-OVER (2b: 8 ops over sweet spot, justified by Method-named per-kind verbs).
APPROVED & FROZEN. 8/9 PASS, 1 JUSTIFIED-OVER (2b). OQ-1..OQ-6 confirmed. Contract verified faithful to as-built code. Module green. No amendments.

SUPERSEDED — this Engine is REMOVED at the system-design level per rework-2026-05-29.md. systemDesignEngine (per-kind Generate prompt assembly + LLM dispatch + parse) is deleted from architecture.dsl. Replaced by systemDesignManager's sequence owning per-step prompts + calls to generic workerAccess.generateTypedData[T]. Contract retained as historical record only.
